topics.title: Michael Vick and Riley Martin Discussion
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding Michael Vick's legal issues, allegations of payment withholding by Howard Stern, and various claims concerning alien genes and time travel.

topics.title: Leona Helmsley and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the death of Leona Helmsley, her lavish mausoleum, and features a series of comedic sketches portraying her character.

topics.title: Michael Vick and Merv Griffin
topics.summary: The studio discusses Michael Vick's legal troubles regarding dog fighting and the reported personal life of late television host Merv Griffin.

topics.title: Richard's Sexuality and Show Humor
topics.summary: The studio explores Richard's perceived bisexuality and his history of engaging in homoerotic humor for the show, including a past instance of tongue-kissing another man.

topics.title: State Fair Fried Treats and Trans Fat Debate
topics.summary: The studio discusses the health implications of trans fats in deep-fried fair foods like Oreos and Snickers bars.

topics.title: Celebrity Gossip and Celebrity Interviews
topics.summary: The studio discusses the public behavior of rappers and pop stars, the career struggles of Steve Martin, and features an interview with actor Kevin Bacon regarding his current filming projects.

topics.title: Kevin Bacon Film Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features an interview with Kevin Bacon regarding his upcoming film Death Sentence and his experiences filming in Montana.

topics.title: Managerial Split and Career Transitions
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional fallout of a long-term management split, the intricacies of talent representation at major agencies, and the transition to new industry partnerships.

topics.title: History Quiz and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where participants are quizzed on American history and government facts while engaging in comedic banter about the difficulty of the questions.

topics.title: Stockbroker Exams and Van Life Stories
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the difficulty of the Series 7 exam, upcoming comedy roast appearances, and Artie Lange’s past experiences living in a van.

topics.title: Legal Defense Tactics and Media News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the reliability of DNA evidence in criminal cases, a comedy promotion mishap involving Artie Lange, and upcoming segments regarding Kevin Bacon and intern show updates.

topics.title: Internship Dynamics and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistics of intern grading, a heated dispute over bar tabs involving an intern named Grillo, and various celebrity updates regarding Jenna Jameson's surgery and Debbie Harry's anti-aging treatments.

topics.title: Sports Scandals and Memorabilia Auctions
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including NBA gambling allegations involving referee Tim Donahoe, the high market value of Barry Bonds' home run ball, and the potential tax implications for its owner.

topics.title: Radio Show Memorabilia and News Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses various topics including the preservation of radio equipment, news reports on Iraq and New Orleans, and upcoming comedy performances.
